title: Workday (WDAY) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Workday (WDAY) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.31 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.11 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.83 per share a year ago.
